channel.title: Kashyap Chambers Constitutional Law Resources
channel.description: Essays and reading notes on anti-defection law, parliamentary privileges, and Indian constitutional practice.

item.title: WordPress Mirror: Anti-Defection Law and Parliamentary Privileges
item.description: The WordPress mirror for the Anti-Defection Law and Parliamentary Privileges resource, including book links, essays, public references, and curator contact information.

item.title: Shaunak Kashyap, Advocate — Public Legal Record
item.description: Selected public legal appearances and constitutional-law resources associated with Shaunak Kashyap, Advocate, Kashyap Chambers.

item.title: Anti-Defection Law and Parliamentary Privileges: A Reading Guide
item.description: A practical entry point for advocates, law students, and researchers approaching the Tenth Schedule, legislative privilege, and constitutional practice.

item.title: What is the Anti-Defection Law in India?
item.description: The Tenth Schedule explained for lawyers, students, and constitutional-law researchers.

item.title: Parliamentary Privileges and Legislative Independence
item.description: A note on Article 105, institutional autonomy, and the function of parliamentary privilege.

item.title: Why this subject matters to advocates and researchers
item.description: Where defection law and privilege turn up in litigation, research, and constitutional practice.
